generated_oml:
instance PhysicalVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator controlled by Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed regulation"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for angular adjustments"
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for real-time vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 360-degree point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LidarObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurements data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurements data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "360-degree LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThreeDVisualizationEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter algorithm for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state and object tracks to enhance driver trust in ADAS decisions"
]

instance VehicleStateAndObjectTracksStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle state and object tracks stored in SQL database"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking activation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RealTimeDataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring including visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDisplayInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading of ACC system to cloud-based Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlService
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDisplayInsight
]

instance LidarPointCloudProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud processing service"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDisplayInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object tracking service"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateAndObjectTracksDisplayInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC control service"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateAndObjectTracksStorageInsight
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables LidarPointCloudProcessingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication via Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables LidarPointCloudProcessingService, ObjectTrackingService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService, ObjectTrackingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables LidarPointCloudProcessingService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track timeseries storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Object tracking system for LiDAR data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle hardware as ROS2 package"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity in cloud/remote as ROS2 package"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity (UI) as ROS2 package"
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Evaluative case study using ISO 23247 reference architecture requirements defined via case-based generalization implementation as ROS2 packages public release of artifacts and demonstration"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Motor voltage commands for speed control and steering servo commands generated by the Actuation FE in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted over Wi-Fi to the Physical Twin Entity for vehicle actuation; emergency braking commands also executed via this channel."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and synchronized clocks across components with ±100 ms accuracy."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (on-vehicle sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC logic), User Entity (UI), and Data Translation FE (inter-entity protocol translation), interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for vehicle control and monitoring, supporting real-time ADAS functions during vehicle operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; OPC UA (IEC 62541) for Data Translation FE protocol translation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and Jetson NX onboard vehicle; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed on external systems; SQL database on remote server."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency."
]
